title: Contract Kit Agent Spec
description: Machine-readable contract a Contract Kit emits so that any agentic system (Claude Code, Cursor, Devin, OpenAI Codex CLI, Copilot Workspace) can pick up the project context, requirements, decisions, and risks without re-reading prose docs. Anchor 1 of CONTRACT_KIT_CREATOR_ANCHORS.md.

version.description: SemVer of this agent-spec document. Bump on breaking shape changes.

intent.description: Raw, untransformed user idea — the original sentence(s) the non-coder typed. Must be preserved verbatim so agents can detect drift.

domain.description: Domain pack id (e.g. 'marketplace', 'b2b-saas', 'fintech'). Drives NFR templates, anti-patterns, and risk register seed.

audience.description: Audiences that consume artifacts derived from this kit. Each entry should be one of 'eng', 'exec', 'legal', 'design', 'ops', 'support', or a free-form custom audience.

capabilities.description: Top-level capabilities the system must provide. Each capability has a stable id (REQ-XXX), a description, a priority, and at least one acceptance criterion. Agents can reverse-map work to these ids.

constraints.description: Non-functional constraints (performance, privacy, regulatory, budget, tech-stack lock-in). Free-form prose strings; richer modeling lives in the PRD.

decisions.description: Architectural decisions cited by id (ADR-XXXX). Each entry references the actual ADR markdown file so agents can drill in.

risks.description: Risk register entries (RISK-XXX). Mapped to OWASP LLM Top 10 categories where relevant (Anchor 4).

id.description: Stable identifier of the form REQ-XXX (zero-padded 3-digit suffix recommended).

description.description: One- or two-sentence summary of what the capability does and who it serves.

priority.description: MoSCoW priority used to drive task-graph ordering and gate severity.

acceptanceCriteria.description: Given/When/Then or RFC 2119 style criteria that define done. Every leaf task in task-graph.yaml that claims to satisfy this capability must cite at least one of these.

id.description: Architectural decision id of the form ADR-XXXX (zero-padded 4-digit suffix recommended).

adrPath.description: Workspace-relative path to the ADR markdown file (e.g. .kilo/contracts/adr/ADR-0007-d2-over-mermaid.md).

id.description: Risk id of the form RISK-XXX (zero-padded 3-digit suffix recommended).

likelihood.description: Likelihood band used by the risk register.

impact.description: Impact band used by the risk register.

mitigation.description: Plain-English mitigation summary. Reference compensating controls, gates, or tests where applicable.

owner.description: Human or role accountable for the residual risk (e.g. 'eng-lead', 'security@example.com').
